queries.question: Show the top 3 cities and countries by the total number of bank accounts.
queries.sql:
SELECT c.name, l.name, COUNT(a.account_number) AS total_accounts
FROM City l
JOIN Banks b ON l.id = b.city_id
JOIN Accounts a ON b.id = a.owner_id JOIN Country c ON c.id = b.country_id
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY total_accounts DESC
LIMIT 3
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name_g (COUNT(?account_number_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?l a :City .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasCity ?l .
  ?a a :Accounts .
  ?a p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?c a :Country .
  ?b p:hasCountry ?c .
  ?l p:name ?name_g .
  ?c p:name ?name .
  ?a p:account_number ?account_number_a .
}
GROUP BY ?name_g ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)
LIMIT 3
queries.note: non-deterministic gold: ORDER BY total_accounts DESC LIMIT 3 with a 5-way tie (all groups COUNT=1) -> SQLite returns an arbitrary 3 of 5; no well-defined answer set

queries.question: Show the top 3 cities by the total number of bank accounts.
queries.sql:
SELECT l.name, COUNT(a.account_number) AS total_accounts
FROM City l
JOIN Banks b ON l.id = b.city_id
JOIN Accounts a ON b.id = a.owner_id
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY total_accounts DESC
LIMIT 3

queries.question: Show the top 3 locations by the total number of bank accounts.
queries.sql:
SELECT l.name, COUNT(a.account_number) AS total_accounts
FROM Country l
JOIN Banks b ON l.id = b.country_id
JOIN Accounts a ON b.id = a.owner_id
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY total_accounts DESC
LIMIT 3
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name_g (COUNT(?account_number_a) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?l a :Country .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasCountry ?l .
  ?a a :Accounts .
  ?a p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?l p:name ?name_g .
  ?a p:account_number ?account_number_a .
}
GROUP BY ?name_g
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)
LIMIT 3

queries.question: Provide a list of cities and countries and the banks located in each of those locations.
queries.sql:
SELECT c.name, l.name, b.bank_name
FROM City l
JOIN Banks b ON l.id = b.city_id JOIN Country c ON c.id = b.country_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?bank_name WHERE {
  ?l a :City .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?b p:hasCity ?l .
  ?c a :Country .
  ?b p:hasCountry ?c .
  ?c p:name ?name .
  ?l p:name ?name2 .
  ?b p:bank_name ?bank_name .
}

queries.question: Provide a list of cities and the banks located in each of those locations.
queries.sql:
SELECT l.name, b.bank_name
FROM City l
JOIN Banks b ON l.id = b.city_id
